description.p: How do you even see out of the mask???

sheet.description: By covering your face you can become a medium for the spirit of the four auspicious beasts. These four beasts give you great abilities.

description.p: Beginning at 1st level, as an action using 1 Cursed Energy, you summon a yellow drill horn for 1 minute. This horn can be used to make an additional melee Cursed Energy attack against a creature within 30 ft as part of your turn, dealing 1d6 piercing damage on a hit. The damage increases to 1d8 at 3rd level, 1d10 at 6th level, 1d12 at 11th level, and 3d6 at 18th level. You can only have one Kaichi at a time.

sheet.description: For 1 cursed energy, summon a yellow drill horn for 1 minute. This horn can be used to make an additional melee Cursed Energy attack against a creature within 30 ft as part of your turn, dealing 1d{{kaichi:damage}} piercing damage on a hit.

For 1 cursed energy, summon a yellow drill horn for 1 minute. This horn can be used to make an additional melee Cursed Energy attack against a creature within 30 ft as part of your turn, dealing 3d6 piercing damage on a hit.

description.p: At 3rd level, you summon dark water to assist yourself. You can use a bonus action to spend 1 Cursed Energy and double your movement until the end of your next turn. Additionally, as a reaction for 2 Cursed Energy, you gain a +5 bonus to AC until the beginning of your next turn.

sheet.description: For 1 cursed energy, double your movement until the end of your next turn. As a reaction for 2 cursed energy, you gain a +5 bonus to AC until the beginning of your next turn.

description.p: Once you reach 6th level, you gain a power to help you last longer in battles. As a bonus action, for every 1 Cursed Energy you spend you gain 5 temporary hit points. While you have these temporary hit points, you ignore exhaustion. However, after activating, your movement is 0 until the start of your next turn.

sheet.description: For every 1 cursed energy spent, gain 5 temporary hit points. While you have these points, you ignore exhaustion. Your movement is 0 until the start of your next turn.

description.p: When you get to 11th level, you gain the last and most powerful Auspicious Beast. As an action for 10 Cursed Energy, you unleash the full power of a dragon. When you use this action, you summon Ryu, and you can command Ryu as a bonus action. Otherwise Ryu takes the dodge action.

sheet.description: For 10 cursed energy, summon Ryu. You can command Ryu as a bonus action. Otherwise, Ryu takes the dodge action.

description.p: Finally, at 18th level, you have honed your Cursed Technique to an extreme. While in this domain, all of your Auspicious Beasts are constantly active without any side effects. Attacks made by Kaichi and Ryu always hit.
For 20 cursed energy, all of your Auspicious Beasts are constantly active without any side effects. Attacks made by Kaichi and Ryu always hit.

ul.li: Saving Throws Dex +3, Con +6, Wis +3, Cha +5
Senses blindsight 30 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 16
Multiattack. Ryu makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) piercing damage.
Claw. Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

setters.set: blindsight 30 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 16

description.p: Ryu makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

sheet.description: Ryu makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

description.p: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) piercing damage. Once bitten, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be grappled. If you attack a grappled creature again they are restrained.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d10 + 4) piercing damage. Once bitten, the target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or be grappled. If you attack a grappled creature again they are restrained.

description.p: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.

element.name: Domain Expansion: Beasts Realm Feature Replacement
